auditor: Ribeyre Chang Haylock Keetley Chartered Professional Accountants
economic_notes: Skatin Nations is located in Skookumchuck, BC. Controlled entity Skatin Nations Treaty Resource Inc. (100% interest). Investments in 1020376 B.C. Ltd. (33.3%), BC FN GRS GP Ltd. (nominal), BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing Limited Partnership (nominal). Administration Building under construction with capitalized borrowing costs of $17,341.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to inability to verify existence, completeness and valuation of tangible capital assets at historical cost, and consequently the opening accumulated surplus. Fiscal year is 2021 not 2024. Short-term debt of $465,007 (Band Administration Building construction loan) is classified separately from long-term debt of $400,684 (CMHC social housing mortgages). Restricted cash per Note 3 is $220,486 (CMHC reserves + St'at'imc Trust) though Statement 4 shows $334,226 restricted cash — discrepancy noted. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $2,928,565 + FNESC $372,852 + First Peoples Cultural Council $159,869 + CMHC $43,385 + BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing $587,299 = $4,092,070. OSR includes logging income, rental income, miscellaneous, interest and Ottawa Trust. No schedule of remuneration provided. Honoraria of $56,833 noted in expenses by object. Related party payments to Tyhee Financial Services Ltd. $404,348 for accounting/bookkeeping.
